experiment: C09 geometry-gated distillation — rank, MLX LoRA (local), held-out carrier eval
falsification_gate: gated-manifold data must beat linear AND base on held-out target transfer by >=+0.05
interpretation: No arm improved held-out transfer over the untrained base (all deltas <=0). ungated_manifold and linear produced bit-identical eval results, confirming their text-SFT data is identical (manifold steer leaves greedy text invariant; arms coincide at the target endpoint). Geometry provenance provides no transfer benefit via text SFT at 2B; gating only avoided the degradation that ungated/linear training caused. Consistent with the structural finding (text-invariance + endpoint coincidence).
tinker: unavailable (account billing-blocked, HTTP 402); used local MLX LoRA
